HomePage.heroSubtitle: Find or offer a ride with peace of mind. Travel confidently with 100% verified profiles and guaranteed payment. That's Wigo Express simplicity.
HomePage.step1Desc: Enter your destination and instantly find available rides. On Wigo Express, we highlight your preferred routes for a pleasant and peaceful journey.
HomePage.step2Desc: ID card, driver's license, and history: every Wigo Express member is carefully checked. We take the time to verify profiles so you can stay worry-free.
HomePage.step3Desc: No need for cash in the car. Your seat is paid online during booking and automatically transferred to the driver. With Wigo Express, everything is simple and 100% secure.
HomePage.driverDesc: Join the Wigo drivers network. You drive, we fill your car with reliable and verified passengers.
HomePage.driverCard1Desc: No more passengers canceling at the last minute without paying. Money is secured upon booking and transferred to you automatically.
HomePage.driverCard2Desc: You don't take random riders. Every identity is strictly confirmed by our system before booking.
HomePage.driverCard3Desc: Your car, your rules. Decide when you leave, how many seats you offer, and accept or decline requests freely.

NotFound.desc: The destination you are looking for does not exist or has been moved. Don't panic, the next starting point is not far.

Footer.mission: The new generation carpooling platform. Secure trips, verified profiles, and guaranteed payment.
